articles.title: Venezuela's leader Delcy Rodriguez is jeered by earthquake survivors as official death toll nears 1,000 with tens of thousands still missing
articles.excerpt: The furious reaction from earthquake victims towards Delcy Rodriguez comes as the death toll from the tremors rose on Friday to 920, with tens of thousands still unaccounted for.
articles.content:
Caracas residents jeered Venezuela's leader during her visit to a neighbourhood badly affected by Wednesday's twin earthquakes, as fury over a lack of government response mounted.
